title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at More Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at More Retail
jsonLd.description:
More Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
